---
title: "01 - Differential Expression"
author: "Jay Nagabhairu"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(here)   # project-root-relative paths (no hardcoded /Users/... paths)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```

Welch two-sample t-tests per probe for two clinically meaningful transitions in
bladder cancer progression, with Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction.

## Load data

```{r load}
clin_data <- read.csv(here("data", "raw", "BC_ClinData_233rows.csv"),
                      stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# The expression matrix is stored gzipped; read.delim reads .gz transparently.
gene_exp <- read.delim(gzfile(here("data", "raw", "BC_GeneExpData_withAnno_233.tsv.gz")),
                       stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)

dim(gene_exp)   # ~43k probes x 233 samples
dim(clin_data)
```

## Helper to run a two-group comparison

```{r helper}
source(here("R", "fnTTest.R"))

run_ttest_analysis <- function(clinical_data, gene_exp_data,
                               group1, group2, test_name,
                               folder_name = here("results", "differential_expression")) {

  clin_subset <- clinical_data %>%
    filter(PrimaryBladderCancerType %in% c(group1, group2)) %>%
    select(GSMid, PrimaryBladderCancerType)

  gene_exp_subset <- gene_exp_data[, colnames(gene_exp_data) %in% clin_subset$GSMid]

  base_group <- gene_exp_subset[, clin_subset$PrimaryBladderCancerType == group1]
  comp_group <- gene_exp_subset[, clin_subset$PrimaryBladderCancerType == group2]

  fnTTest(baseGroup = base_group, compGroup = comp_group,
          testName = test_name, baseGroupName = group1,
          compGroupName = group2, folderName = folder_name)
}
```

## Comparison 1: pre-cancer field vs superficial (stage 1) tumor

```{r comp1}
run_ttest_analysis(
  clinical_data = clin_data, gene_exp_data = gene_exp,
  group1 = "Bladder mucosae surrounding cancer",
  group2 = "Primary_BC_Superficial",
  test_name = "precancer_vs_stage1"
)
```

## Comparison 2: superficial (stage 1) vs invasive (stage 2) tumor

```{r comp2}
run_ttest_analysis(
  clinical_data = clin_data, gene_exp_data = gene_exp,
  group1 = "Primary_BC_Superficial",
  group2 = "Primary_BC_Invasive",
  test_name = "stage1_vs_stage2"
)

cat("T-test analysis complete; results written to results/differential_expression/\n")
```
